samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
	<input id="clk" width_description="[0:0]"></input>
	<input id="rst_n" width_description="[0:0]"></input>
	<input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]"></input>
	<input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]"></input>
	
	<output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]"></output>
	
	<parameter_description>
		<size value="4"></size>
	endparameter_description
	
	<ports>
		<input id="clk" width_description="[0:0]"></input>
		<input id="rst_n" width_description="[0:0]"></input>
		<input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]"></input>
		<input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]"></input>
		
		<output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]"></output>
	endports
	
	<logic_description type="combinational_logic">
		reg [2*size-1:0] regs [0:size];
		wire [2*size-1:0] add_in;
		genvar i;
		generate
			for(i=0;i<=size-1;i=i+1) begin : gen_regs
				if (i==0)begin
					assign add_in[2*i+:2*size]=mul_a*{size{mul_b[i]}};
					always @(posedge clk,negedge rst_n) begin
						if(!rst_n)begin
							regs[i]<=0;
						end else begin
							regs[i]<=add_in[2*i+:2*size];
						end
					end
				end else if(i==size-1)begin
					assign add_in[2*i+:2*size]=regs[i-1]+(mul_a<<i)*{size{mul_b[i]}};
					always @(posedge clk,negedge rst_n) begin
						if(!rst_n)begin
							regs[i]<=0;
						end else begin
							regs[i]<=add_in[2*i+:2*size];
						end
					end
				end else begin
					assign add_in[2*i+:2*size]=regs[i-1]+((mul_a<<(i)))*{size{mul_b[i]}};
					always @(posedge clk,negedge rst_n) begin
						if(!rst_n)begin
							regs[i]<=0;
						end else begin
							regs[i]<=add_in[2*i+:2*size];
						end
					end
				end
			end
		endgenerate
		integer j;
		always@(posedge clk,negedge rst_n)begin
			if (!rst_n) begin
				mul_out <= 0;
			end else begin
				mul_out <= regs[size-1];
			end
		end
	endlogic_description
endmodule
